GET /metrics/last-updated returns lastCrawledAt ISO-8601 or null before first run — verified: MetricControllerTest null + timestamp + unauthenticated-redirects

All 61 tests pass including SocialCrawlerServiceTest, CrawlJobServiceTest, MetricControllerTest — verified: ./mvnw test exit 0, 61 tests 0 failures
